landing.tagline: AI-powered crop planning, weather alerts, and personalized farming advice — built for Tamil Nadu farmers.
landing.featuresTitle: Everything a Tamil Nadu farmer needs
landing.feature1Desc: Get personalized crop recommendations based on your land, soil, and weather.
landing.feature2Desc: SMS alerts when extreme weather threatens your crops — in your language.
landing.feature3Desc: From sowing to selling — a visual plan covering every stage of farming.
landing.feature4Desc: Ask questions by voice in Tamil, Hindi, or English — get answers instantly.
landing.footer: © 2025 FarmAdvisor · Built for Tamil Nadu Farmers · AI-powered by OpenAI

schemes.title: Government Schemes for Farmers
schemes.empty: Schemes will appear here once seeded.

login.subtitle: Login to access your farm dashboard

register.title: FarmAdvisor — Register
register.name: Full Name
register.addressNote: We'll use this to locate your farm on the map in the next step.
register.errPasswordShort: Password must be at least 8 characters

map.instruction: Mark your land boundary on the map
map.searchPlaceholder: Search your village, town or district...
map.drawingHint: Click to add points · Double-click or press Done to finish
map.firstSearchHint: First search your location above to zoom in, then click "Draw Land Boundary"

chat.title: Farm Advisor Chat
chat.emptyHint: Ask me anything about farming, crops, weather, or market prices.
chat.error: Sorry, something went wrong. Please try again.

cropPlan.title: Crop Plan
cropPlan.subtitle: Your AI-generated seasonal farming roadmap
cropPlan.generatingSubtitle: Analyzing your land, soil data, and seasonal conditions

planChat.title: Plan Assistant
planChat.subtitle: Ask questions or request changes
planChat.emptyHint: Chat to adjust your plan — shift dates, add stages, change costs and more.
examples: Add an extra pest control stage
planChat.placeholder: Ask about or change your plan...
planChat.error: Sorry, something went wrong. Please try again.

assessment.title: Let's build your crop plan
assessment.subtitleState: Tell me about your current farming situation.
assessment.subtitleQuestions: A few quick questions so your plan is tailored to your land.
assessment.optUnsureLabel: I'm planning — not sure what to grow
assessment.optUnsureDesc: Get AI crop suggestions for your land
assessment.optSpecificLabel: I have a crop in mind
assessment.optSpecificDesc: Validate and get a detailed plan
assessment.optMidDesc: Track progress and get remaining guidance

experience.q: How long have you been farming?

grownBefore.q: Have you grown any crop on this land before?

previousCrops.q: Which crop(s) did you grow on this land most recently?

lastGrownWhen.q: When did you last grow it?

pastIssues.q: Did you face any problems? (pests, disease, water, soil…)
pastIssues.ph: e.g. Stem borer attack, low rainfall

irrigation.q: What is your main source of irrigation?

fertilizers.q: Which fertilizers do you usually use?

assessment.finalCropLabel: Which crop are you planning to grow?
assessment.finalMidLabel: Tell me about your current crop
assessment.finalMidPlaceholder: e.g. Growing paddy, sowed 3 weeks ago, looks healthy...
assessment.startDateLabel: When do you plan to start?
assessment.startDateHint: Your plan's schedule will be built from this date.
assessment.finalUnsureMsg: Thanks! I'll use your answers to suggest the best crops for your land.

profile.title: My Profile
profile.soilReportSubtitle: Upload your lab soil test report. AI will extract nutrient data automatically.

soil.browseHint: or click to browse (JPEG, PNG, PDF — max 10MB)
